Professional Summary

Bharti Basumatary is a detail-oriented QA Automation Engineer with experience across banking, telecom, payment, real estate, and edtech products. She specializes in Selenium WebDriver with Java, TestNG, Cucumber, REST Assured, API validation, SQL verification, and Agile delivery.

Her work focuses on building maintainable automation frameworks, strengthening release quality, and improving collaboration between QA, product, and engineering teams.

Pune, India ISTQB Certified B.Tech in Computer Science Agile Delivery

Services

Specialized QA and automation capabilities aligned with modern product engineering teams.

Service cards are aligned to the direction you requested while staying consistent with the experience already shown on the site.

QA Automation

Design and execution of maintainable automated test suites for critical workflows, regression packs, and release validation.

Selenium Framework Development

Framework architecture using Java, Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, Page Object Model, reusable utilities, and reporting.

API Testing

Functional and automated API validation with Postman and REST Assured, including status codes, payload checks, and backend verification.

Playwright Automation

Modern browser automation strategy for high-speed UI verification and scalable future-ready testing workflows.

Test Framework Design

Hybrid, BDD, and data-driven architecture tailored to product teams that need maintainable, fast, and recruiter-grade engineering maturity.
